description: Starter corpus for post-hoc evaluation of autocoder-produced patch outputs. This corpus defines what we want to MEASURE, not tasks to execute. Each entry below is an evaluation definition: a goal, the allowed file surface, expected artifacts, expected tests, scoring dimensions, risk, and non-goals. A report-only evaluator (scripts/local/run_autocoder_real_output_eval.py) reads this corpus and one or more result packets and emits a metrics report. v0 is intentionally tolerant and report-only; it does not execute models and does not mutate GitHub.

tasks.title: Append a single documentation line
tasks.goal: Append one validation line to docs/wfa_next_steps.md without altering any other file.
non_goals: Do not modify any Python file
Do not touch CI workflow files

tasks.title: Add a small report-only helper script
tasks.goal: Add a single new script under scripts/local/ that is read-only (no GitHub mutation, no model execution, no shell=True). The script must write a JSON and/or Markdown artifact. It must be reviewed and merged without follow-up cleanup.
non_goals: Do not introduce gh mutation strings

tasks.title: Add a regression test for an existing helper
tasks.goal: Add one new test under tests/ that covers an edge case in an existing helper. No production code is changed. The test must pass on the first CI run.
non_goals: Do not modify any script under scripts/
Do not skip or xfail the new test

tasks.title: Narrow a checker behavior with explicit guard
tasks.goal: Tighten the behavior of a single local script (under scripts/local/) by replacing an early-return-on-bad-pattern with a bounded-poll loop. Must be guarded by a new test that fails on the old behavior and passes on the new one. Must not change CLI flags.
non_goals: Do not add a CLI flag
Do not change the helper's output schema
Do not introduce a fallback path that masks the original bug

tasks.title: Validate a packet schema and emit a report
tasks.goal: Add a small packet validator that reads a JSON file matching a declared schema (packet_kind, schema_version, and a small set of required fields). Emit a JSON and Markdown validation report. The validator must be tolerant of unknown fields and must reject only missing required fields, wrong types, or wrong packet_kind.
non_goals: Do not depend on an external schema library
Do not introduce live model invocation
